comments: The drafted contract correctly bounds the V0.8 hotfix to npm publication preparation: package.json definition updates, TypeScript compilation through prepublishOnly, and human-facing publication instructions to resolve npm E404 errors for team-agents-cowork. The allowed files are limited to package metadata, documentation, and task artifacts. The out_of_scope section explicitly forbids implementing the Node.js DAG execution runner, modifying active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside the patch progression, and performing interactive npm publish or npm login. Stop conditions reinforce the prohibition on interactive npm login and source/bin code modifications beyond dependency management. Contract approved.
